text: The chicken shawarma plate is exactly what I crave when I'm home in Houston. Generous portions and the garlic sauce is perfect.
Reliable Mediterranean spot. The hummus and tabbouleh are fresh, though it gets busy at dinner.
Came back over the holidays and it's still my favourite. The falafel wrap is excellent.
Fadi's fattoush with sumac takes me right back to my mother's table. Cafeteria-style but the quality is wonderful.
So many vegetarian options and everything tastes homemade. The spinach fatayer are a must.
Great value mixed grill. Lines can be long at lunch but they move quickly.
My go-to for tahini, za'atar and sumac when I stock up to take home. The bakery counter alone is worth the trip.
Huge selection of imported pantry goods and fresh bread. Can get crowded on weekends.
Found everything for tabbouleh and kunafa in one stop. Prices are fair and the staff are friendly.
Lovely to find proper jollof and suya in Houston. The party jollof was smoky and just right.
Flavours are great and the plantain side is a treat. Service was a little slow but worth the wait.
Strong, well-pulled black coffee and a calm corner to read. Exactly what I look for in the mornings.
Excellent espresso and pastries. Seating fills up fast on weekend mornings.
The banana bread and the kouign-amann are dangerously good. A lovely spot for an afternoon Earl Grey.
Beautiful pastries and good coffee. It's popular, so expect a short wait at peak times.
Best bakery in Montrose. The morning bun is worth the line every time.
Quick, fresh build-your-own pitas. The falafel grain bowl is a great vegetarian option.
Affordable and tasty. Lentil soup is comforting and the portions are generous.
Creative plant-based plates and a relaxed vibe. Good stop on my vegetarian days.
Flavourful vegan food that even non-vegans enjoy. A bit pricey but worth trying.
Cosy Lebanese spot with excellent baked chicken and toum. The baklava is a perfect end to the meal.
Warm service and home-style cooking. Small dining room, so reservations help on weekends.
Great local produce and a solid deli counter. The chicken salad sandwich is a reliable lunch.
Fresh, seasonal options and friendly staff. Slightly pricey but good quality.
